Article Title: ‘Not happening today!’: Is Ashwin hinting at MS Dhoni’s retirement in 2027?
Article Text:
Chennai Super Kings' MS Dhoni plays a shot during a practice session. (PTI Photo)

“Not happening today!”: Ashwin drops selection bombshell

Net session sparks hope amid confusion

Ashwin adds to the intrigue

CHENNAI: As Chennai Super Kings prepare for their final home game of IPL 2026 against Sunrisers Hyderabad on Monday, one question has completely overshadowed the build up — will MS Dhoni play at Chepauk?The MA Chidambaram Stadium has been at the centre of rising anticipation ever since Dhoni’s subtle but intriguing training routine on the eve of the match, with fans scanning every possible clue about his availability.Former India spinner Ravichandran Ashwin , however, appeared to pour cold water on the speculation with a blunt social media post that instantly went viral and intensified the debate around Dhoni’s role.“Not happening today! In 2027? May be. Don’t think any batting changes will happen. Akeal Hosein in?” Ashwin posted ahead of CSK’s final home game of the season against SRH.The timing of the post created a fresh wave of discussion, with fans interpreting it as a clear indication that Dhoni may not feature in the playing XI. It also triggered renewed conversations around his future.Adding further fuel to the buzz, CSK’s own social media activity amplified speculation. The franchise urged fans to stay back after the match for a traditional “Lap of Honour,” a message that quickly snowballed into retirement chatter online.“It’s time to give back to you, Superfans. Stay back and be a part of our annual ritual - Lap of Honour!” CSK posted ahead of the Chepauk clash.As per an Indian Express report, Dhoni’s match-eve routine added another layer to the mystery. A padded-up Dhoni was seen walking out at 6:30 PM, heading to the indoor nets without a trainer for the first time in weeks.After light stretching, he spent time in the nets for nearly 30 minutes, facing throwdowns and spinners, even clearing the boundary multiple times before returning to the dressing room by 7:30 PM.Dhoni’s availability has remained the biggest talking point of CSK’s season. He has missed matches due to injury concerns and later stepped away from selection considerations to maintain balance within the XI.However, the uncertainty continues to fuel anticipation, especially with CSK still mathematically in contention for a playoff push.Ticket demand has surged ahead of the fixture, with Chepauk expected to be packed for what could be one of the most emotionally charged nights of the season.In another comment that kept the debate alive, Ashwin had earlier suggested Dhoni has been fit for some time and could still feature, contrary to his latest post.“I have a feeling that against Sunrisers Hyderabad, there is a good chance of MS Dhoni playing,” he had said.
Article Summary: Chennai Super Kings face Sunrisers Hyderabad at Chepauk on Monday. MS Dhoni's availability has remained the biggest talking point of CSK’s season. Ravichandran Ashwin appeared to pour cold water on the speculation with a blunt social media post.

Article Title: ‘I didn’t drop him because…’: Ganguly reveals how he fought selectors for Dravid, reshaped India’s ODI team
Article Text:
File Pic: Rahul Dravid and Sourav Ganguly (TOI Photo)

‘Selectors said his strike rate isn’t good’

Rebuilding India’s ODI balance

‘Good teams had all-rounders — we had to create solutions’

Poll Should selectors have prioritized strike rate over experience when evaluating players like Rahul Dravid? Yes, strike rate is crucial No, experience matters more

NEW DELHI: Former India captain Sourav Ganguly has opened up about the behind-the-scenes battles he fought with selectors during his captaincy tenure to protect and reshape Rahul Dravid ’s ODI career, revealing how close the batting legend came to being dropped over concerns about his strike rate.Speaking on Raj Shamani’s podcast, Ganguly recalled how Dravid’s place in the ODI side was repeatedly questioned by selectors who believed the team needed more aggressive batting options. The former skipper, however, stood firm in his belief that Dravid’s value went far beyond strike rate numbers.“Rahul Dravid... people used to come to me and say his strike rate isn't good. Selectors used to say to look for someone else in ODIs, ‘marna padta hai’ (you have to be able to hit),” Ganguly said.But the former captain revealed he resisted the pressure, convinced that dropping Dravid could have permanently derailed his white-ball career.“But I didn’t drop him. Because ‘chhod diya toh khatam ho jayega’ (if I let him go, he would be finished),” he added.Ganguly said he instead worked closely with Dravid to adapt his game for the demands of ODI cricket. “So I used to go to him separately and tell him, ‘Jam, thoda khelna hai’ (you have to play a bit).And he was such a great player, he adapted. Played at number 5 for India, kept wickets.”Ganguly further revealed that Dravid’s evolution into a wicketkeeper-batter was part of a larger strategy to balance the side, especially in the absence of a genuine all-rounder.“We needed a wicketkeeper who could bat, and that allowed us to play Mohammad Kaif as an extra batter,” he explained.The former captain also highlighted how India had to compensate for the lack of all-round options by sharing responsibilities across the batting unit. “We didn’t really have a proper all-rounder either. So Sehwag bowled, Sachin bowled, I bowled, and Yuvi bowled.”According to Ganguly, building a competitive side required flexibility rather than rigid roles. “Toh team ko banana tha na (we had to build a team),” he said.Reflecting on that era, Ganguly stressed that India’s approach was shaped by necessity as much as vision.“Good teams had all-rounders and keeper-batters, which we didn’t have at that time. Toh woh zaroori tha team banane ke liye (that was necessary to build the team),” he said.The approach not only prolonged Dravid’s ODI career but also helped India become more flexible in white-ball cricket, laying the foundation for a more dynamic unit in the years that followed.Ganguly’s revelations highlight how tactical decisions and internal debates behind the scenes played a crucial role in shaping one of India’s most balanced ODI eras — and how a willingness to back players like Dravid helped redefine roles long before modern cricket demanded it.
Article Summary: Sourav Ganguly reveals how close Rahul Dravid came to being dropped over concerns about his strike rate. Former India captain says he resisted the pressure, convinced that dropping him could have permanently derailed his white- ball career. Ganguly said he instead worked closely with Dravids to adapt his game for the demands of ODI cricket.

Article Title: RJ Mahvash breaks silence on Yuzvendra Chahal relationship rumours after unfollow drama
Article Text:
RJ Mahvash and Yuzvendra Chahal

RJ Mahvash has finally responded to the growing social media buzz around her relationship with Indian spinner Yuzvendra Chahal , after fans noticed that the two had unfollowed each other on Instagram.Speaking about the speculation, the actor and content creator clarified that the online reaction was overblown and stemmed from a very minor disagreement. She insisted that such digital unfollows or temporary distancing are common even among close friends and should not be read too deeply. Mahvash said people often exaggerate normal friendship dynamics online. According to her, small misunderstandings do not change the foundation of real bonds. “People have a habit of making a fuss over small things. It is not such a big deal when you go through it,” she said during a conversation with Pinkvilla.She also referred to Chahal’s earlier openness about his mental health struggles, saying she felt a sense of responsibility to stand by him during difficult phases.“Like he also mentioned in his podcast that he had suicidal thoughts and all of that. During that time, we all tried to help in every possible way so that he could just get through the season well.Everyone supported him together, openly and quietly, because he was going through a lot,” Mahvash said.Mahvash added that her actions were guided purely by loyalty and friendship rather than anything else. “For me, it was simply about standing by my friends whenever they need me,” she said.She also made it clear that she would continue to support the leg-spinner and maintain normal communication going forward, stressing that friendships should not be judged through social media optics.Meanwhile, Yuzvendra Chahal continues his IPL 2026 campaign with Punjab Kings. He has taken 10 wickets in 13 matches this season at an economy rate of 8.73. Overall, he remains the highest wicket-taker in IPL history with 231 wickets, underlining his long-standing impact in the tournament. He last played for India in August 2023 and was part of the T20 World Cup-winning 2024 squad, though he did not feature in any match.
Article Summary: RJ Mahvash and Yuzvendra Chahal unfollowed each other on Instagram. The actor and content creator said the reaction was overblown. She insisted that such digital unfollows are common even among close friends. She also said she would continue to support the leg-spinner.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Riyan Parag’s late gamble backfires as Delhi Capitals stay alive with win over RR
Article Text:
Delhi Capitals' captain Axar Patel, right, and Ashutosh Sharma celebrates (AP Photo)

New Delhi: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was batting on 43 runs from 17 balls. A voice nearby said jokingly, "We've become so used to his explosive scoring that this doesn't even feel an anomaly. " Come to think of it, it is true.So when he came to the Arun Jaitley Stadium on Sunday night, to face Delhi Capitals, and took his sixes tally in IPL 2026 to 43, including three on the night, it didn't look out of place. He has now registered the most sixes by an Indian batter in a single IPL season, surpassing Abhishek Sharma's 42 in 2024.Yet, his collective tally of 440 runs (before the match), put him outside the top-10 in the Orange Cap race. 46 runs later -- having faced 21 balls -- laced with three sixes and five boundaries, he had catapulted sixth in the list. His stay in the middle was stopped short by Madhav Tiwari.The 22-year-old Delhi Capitals seamer had made his mark in the win against the Punjab Kings on May 11. With his 2/40 and a valuable cameo of unbeaten 18 runs, the Madhya Pradesh youngster had found a place for second game running.He once again proved decisive with figures of 2/27 even though Lungi Ngidi (2/24) was more economical and Mitchell Starc (4/40) more lethal. Starc struck thrice in an over -- was on a hat-trick chance -- with wickets of Riyan Parag , Donovan Ferreira and Ravi Singh.The big impact, however, arguably, was the wicket of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to not just apply the brakes on a motoring machine, but also getting rid of a potential massive total further down the line.Despite the wicket, that appeared to be a real possibility. RR were 160/2 after 14 overs with Dhruv Jurel and Riyan Parag stitching a 72-run partnership. Skipper Parag was doing the bulk of the scoring with a 26-ball 51 to show for himself.At the fag end, Tiwari added the wicket of Shubham Dubey as DC bowlers delivered in the manner they hadn't at home so far in the season. They brought in plenty of variations to the fore: Nigid with a mix of slower 'uns and deliveries that climbed up to the batters.Eventually, RR were stopped on 193/8 -- well short of a 220-plus total at one stage -- with the last six overs resulting in just 33 runs at the cost of six wickets.“Coming into this IPL season, I just thought that I'm gonna take in four or five variations with me and I'm gonna back them throughout the season. So, I have been working on them, and hopefully, the results are helping in my favour," said Tiwari during the mid-innings interaction.“I guess there was a bit of help from the wicket. It was gripping, and so I thought that I could use more of them. I was just looking to put myself (in) a high‑pressure situation in the nets themselves. So bowling to (David) Miller and bowling to Ashutosh (Sharma) and KL (Rahul) helped me."I was just trying to figure out how I'm gonna bowl against these batsmen, which is gonna help me in this tournament,” he continued.In reply, Delhi Capitals looked to be motoring to the 194-run target, just the way Rajasthan Royals had started strongly. Abhishek Porel and KL Rahul put together 105 runs on the scoreboard in under 10 overs and the target looked well in sights.But, much like RR's effort, DC also lost the plot with one wicket after another. Abhishek Porel (51), KL Rahul (56) and Axar Patel (34*) went to double digits but the chase got nervous. Sahil Parakh (9), Tristan Stubbs (4) and David Miller (9) all came and perished without much of a role.Similar to DC's trio of seamers who pulled the game back, it was Jofra Archer who kept them in the hunt. His 2/35 kept RR alive in the contest with wickets and flow of runs being curtailed.Riyan Parag's decision to hand the ball to Donovan Ferreira proved to be a big turning point. In the 18th over, Ferreira came on for his first of the night and was smacked for 16 runs to ease any pressure.12 runs in the penultimate over and 10 off the two balls in the last saw DC walk past the finish line in the end and break their losing streak at home.In the grand scheme of things, RR are still alive in the playoff race but on a night they were cruising with the bat and had DC needing 35 runs off 3 overs, it is an opportunity squandered.
Article Summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hits three sixes as Delhi Capitals beat Rajasthan Royals. Delhi bowler Madhav Tiwari takes 2/27 as RR are bowled out for 194. Delhi captain Axar Patel (34) and Abhishek Porel (51) top score for Delhi.

Article Title: IPL 2026: 'He must have a lot going on'- Ashwin reacts to Ricky Ponting’s lone dugout moment
Article Text:
Ricky Ponting (X)

Poll Should Punjab Kings maintain a single home venue to improve performance? Yes, it will help with consistency No, multiple venues have their benefits

Punjab Kings’ IPL 2026 campaign has reached a critical breaking point, with the franchise now on the brink of elimination after a sixth consecutive defeat, this time against Royal Challengers Bengaluru.The loss in Dharamshala not only dented their playoff hopes but also left head coach Ricky Ponting visibly dejected. As the match ended, Ponting was seen sitting alone in the Punjab Kings dugout, staring out in silence at the scenic backdrop — a moment that quickly went viral and was described as a “powerful picture” by former India all-rounder Ravichandran Ashwin Ashwin , speaking on his YouTube show Ash Ki Baat, said the image captured the emotional weight of Punjab’s collapse in form. While expressing sympathy for both Ponting and skipper Shreyas Iyer , he also pointed to deeper structural issues within the franchise.“I saw a powerful picture on TV after the match today. Ricky Ponting was leaning forward in the dugout, all alone. He must have a lot going on inside his head. They were in the prime position to run away and take the top two spot in this tournament. I think they must be asking themselves where they went wrong. I sat on the same chair in 2018. I am not defending them, but I said in the last episode as well, the three or four champion teams don't play at different home venues.You were winning in Mullanpur continuously, then you went to Dharamshala and you lost three consecutive home games,” he said.Ashwin further expanded on his criticism, questioning Punjab Kings’ decision to split home games between Mullanpur and Dharamshala, arguing that it has disrupted rhythm and familiarity.“These are young players, and even foreign players are struggling. There's a big difference between Mullanpur and Dharamshala when it comes to pace and bounce. The soil is the same but the altitude is different. This is also an away game for Punjab. If they had won even one of these home games, they would've been smiling right now,” he said.“They defended 220 in Mullanpur against SRH because they know the wicket that well. They practised at the venue even before the IPL started. Making pitches is one thing, but getting yourself accustomed to the conditions is different. It's quite disappointing. I feel sad for Punjab. You shouldn't leave your home ground. If it makes business sense, let it only make business sense, but if you want to win and qualify, you can't afford to make these mistakes. Ricky Ponting will be distraught, Shreyas Iyer will be too, but it is incredibly hard,” Ashwin further added.With their playoff hopes hanging by a thread, Punjab Kings now head into a must-win final league match against Lucknow Super Giants at the Ekana Cricket Stadium.
Article Summary: Ravichandran Ashwin criticises Punjab Kings' decision to split home games between Mullanpur and Dharamshala. The former India all-rounder says the decision has disrupted rhythm and familiarity. Punjab Kings now head into a must-win final league match against Lucknow Super Giants.

Article Title: ‘It’s painful to watch’: Mohammad Kaif’s brutal fielding criticism raises IPL 2026 alarm
Article Text:
Rajasthan Royals skipper Riyan Parag sets the field during IPL 2026 match against Delhi Capitals. (ANI Photo)

‘Very poor’ execution: Parag reacts after RR defeat

A wider fielding problem across IPL 2026

Poll What do you think is the main cause of the decline in fielding standards this IPL season? Lack of training Nervousness among young players Increased pressure in matches

NEW DELHI: The ongoing IPL 2026 season has come under sharp scrutiny for a worrying decline in fielding standards, with former India cricketer Mohammad Kaif leading the criticism after highlighting repeated errors and poor catching across teams.The numbers underline the concern. Across 59 matches tracked by CricViz, fielders have dropped 153 catches while completing 541, resulting in a catching efficiency of just 77.9% — a steep dip for a tournament often defined by razor-thin margins.Kaif, known for his elite fielding standards during his playing days, did not hold back in his assessment of recent performances.“It’s painful to watch the fielding in this IPL. Today Yash Raj dropped KL when he was on zero. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi too misfielded. The young boy hasn’t taken a catch this season. While playing for India he needs to be sharper on the field. It is the duty of coaches to teach youngsters fielding skills. On their part, the boys should enjoy fielding and take pride in it,” he posted on Sunday night.Kaif’s comments came on a day when Rajasthan Royals once again faltered in the field during their five-wicket defeat to Delhi Capitals at the Arun Jaitley Stadium.RR skipper Riyan Parag admitted that fielding lapses, along with bowling inconsistencies, cost his side dearly in a crucial match. “Very poor. You’ve got to be better than what we’ve done today. Extremely disappointed,” he said.Parag stressed that RR failed to capitalise on a strong platform and allowed the game to slip away in both execution and energy. “We were in a pretty good space after 14 overs… it had to be 220-230,” he noted about their batting failures, adding that both bowling and fielding standards were also “not up to the mark.”The RR captain did not shy away from responsibility either, stating that repeated underperformance in recent matches has left the franchise in a must-win situation in their remaining games to stay alive in the playoff race.RR’s defeat has only added to the broader concerns raised by Kaif, with dropped catches and misfields becoming a recurring theme across teams this season. What was once considered a defining strength of franchise cricket — sharp athletic fielding — now appears to be under strain, with execution errors increasingly influencing match outcomes.As the playoff race tightens, the fielding conversation has shifted from isolated mistakes to a systemic concern.
Article Summary: IPL 2026 season has come under sharp scrutiny for a worrying decline in fielding standards. Former India cricketer Mohammad Kaif has highlighted repeated errors and poor catching across teams. Across 59 matches tracked by CricViz, fielders have dropped 153 catches while completing 541, resulting in a catching efficiency of just 77.9%.

Article Title: 'I have a problem': Jofra Archer IPL involvement in question as Michael Vaughan blasts ECB-BCCI deal
Article Text:
Rajasthan Royals' Jofra Archer (PTI Photo)

Former England captain Michael Vaughan has raised concerns over England’s handling of Jofra Archer ’s availability, questioning whether centrally contracted players should be allowed to prioritise franchise commitments over Test cricket as England gear up for their home summer against New Zealand.Speaking on Cricbuzz, the former England captain highlighted Archer’s ongoing IPL involvement in India while England gear up for the first Test at Lord’s, suggesting the situation reflects a broader structural imbalance between international boards and franchise leagues.England have named their squad for the opening Test against New Zealand starting June 4, with Jofra Archer left out as the ECB continues to carefully manage his return to red-ball cricket following a long injury layoff. Despite being one of England’s most potent fast bowlers and a proven performer at Lord’s, he will not feature in the series opener.Vaughan’s criticism, however, was directed more at the system than the player himself. “I’m sure he’ll be in the squad (for the second Test). It comes midway through June. I think we have a problem in English cricket at the moment because Jofra was obviously staying for the full IPL. There’s some contract that the ECB have done with the BCCI that’s allowing all our players to stay for the duration,” he said.He went on to question the hierarchy of commitments under central contracts, arguing that international duty should take precedence. “If that’s the case, I have a problem with England’s contracts because Jofra has been looked after by them for a few years now on a very handsome contract. So who holds the key to that? I believe the international contract outweighs any franchise,” Vaughan added.While he acknowledged the value of franchise tournaments, Vaughan warned that Test cricket risks being undermined if priorities are not clearly defined. “Look, all these franchise leagues are fantastic. I love them for the players. But I do feel that if we start to put domestic leagues over and above a Test match, I think there’s a real problem now.”He also pointed to the confusion created for players when scheduling agreements overlap with international fixtures, leaving boards to balance competing priorities. “England have got to make a decision because many have spoken out about it in the last week, rightfully so, because we feel that if you’re playing for England in your Test match, players should be back home playing for England. That’s what your central contract says you should be doing. ”Vaughan suggested that if England are committed to allowing full IPL participation, then their international calendar may need to be adjusted accordingly. “If there is an agreement that the ECB have done with the BCCI, well, I think you’ve got to start your Test summer somewhere a little bit later then.”From a leadership standpoint, he stressed that team management would always prefer full-strength availability for marquee matches. “If I was Rob Key, the director of cricket, or Brendon McCullum , the coach, I would want my best bowler playing in that first Test against New Zealand at Lord’s. Not here.”For Vaughan, the issue ultimately feeds into a bigger concern about the direction of Test cricket. “We want to see our best players playing Test match cricket. Those staying, they’re continuing to play the longest format of the game. I want to see them playing for their country.”On the franchise front, Jofra Archer has also been in strong form. He is Rajasthan Royals ’ leading wicket-taker and ranks among their top five overall wicket-takers. In IPL 2026, he has claimed 17 wickets in 12 matches at an economy rate of 9.09, continuing to make a significant impact in the league.
Article Summary: England have named their squad for the opening Test against New Zealand starting June 4. Jofra Archer was left out as the ECB continues to carefully manage his return to red-ball cricket following a long injury layoff. Former England captain Michael Vaughan questioned whether centrally contracted players should be allowed to prioritise franchise commitments over Test cricket.

Article Title: IPL 2026: After a break, ‘Finnisher’ finally checks in for KKR
Article Text:
Kolkata Knight Riders' Finn Allen (ANI Photo)

Poll Which aspect of Finn Allen's game contributed most to his success? Aggressive batting style Ability to rotate strike

KOLKATA: Kolkata Knight Riders have struggled to lock in a settled opening pair since releasing Phil Salt ahead of the 2025 IPL mega auction. The England international had been pivotal in their 2024 title run alongside Sunil Narine, giving KKR explosive starts. But the combinations tried since haven’t yielded the same consistency.The problem persisted into this season as well, until Finn Allen offered a glimmer of hope. It was perhaps a little late in the campaign. KKR initially backed Allen over compatriot Tim Seifert, but he failed to fire consistently and was dropped after five games.Seifert’s stint did little to change fortunes, managing just 19 runs, including two ducks, from three innings. That prompted KKR to restore Allen at the top and he responded emphatically.Coming back after a brief break, Allen looked a transformed batter, smashing a match-winning 93 off just 35 balls against Gujarat Titans at Eden Gardens on Saturday.“You know, when you go out of the side, you have time to relax and take a breath and, I guess, look at things from a different perspective,” Allen said. “I love playing cricket. I love batting.And I probably wasn’t enjoying it as much as I should have because I was putting so much pressure on myself. Having those few games off really did me a good thing.”Allen did ride his luck, being dropped thrice, but made it count against what he described as one of the best bowling attacks in the competition, on a surface where stroke-making wasn’t easy.“Today it was definitely tricky at the start. We knew that and we were up against two of the best opening bowlers,” he said, referring to Mohammed Siraj and Kagiso Rabada.With Ajinkya Rahane falling early, Allen assumed responsibility. “I just wanted to be there for a long time. I knew I had to take a bit of responsibility.”Keeping it simple proved effective. “If it’s there, try and hit it. If not, just rotate strike,” Allen said. It’s the kind of clarity KKR will hope brings stability to their long-standing opening dilemma.
Article Summary: Kolkata Knight Riders have struggled to find a settled opening pair since releasing Phil Salt ahead of the 2025 IPL mega auction. The problem persisted into this season as well, until Finn Allen offered a glimmer of hope. KKR initially backed Allen over compatriot Tim Seifert, but he failed to fire consistently and was dropped.

Article Title: ‘Told Ruturaj he is free not to take a single piece of advice’: Dhoni ahead of CSK’s final home game
Article Text:
CSK captain Ruturaj Gaikwad, right, and MS Dhoni during a training session. (PTI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

ALSO READ:

Poll Will MS Dhoni play in CSK's final home game of the season? Yes, he will play No, he will not play

CHENNAI: There’s a lot of anticipation whether MS Dhoni will be seen in action for one last time at the MA Chidambaram Stadium on Monday. He came in late for practice on Sunday, got padded up, did a bit of warm-up and headed straight to the nets, hitting those huge sixes we are so used to seeing over the years.There was no clarity from CSK whether he will play, even though it was told that he will do the customary fan events that he does every year at the end of CSK’s home campaign.Even though Dhoni has been missed in the middle through the season due to his calf injury, his experience has been invaluable for the team. During an event prior to the practice session Sunday, Dhoni spoke about his suggestions to captain Ruturaj Gaikwad “What I told Rutu was to run CSK the way he wanted to run it. That’s how I have run CSK for a very long time. And I always felt it’s a game where the captain has to make the decisions. Yes, there are coaches and support stuff, but it’s not like football where the manager decides. In cricket, it’s about the captain and he has to decide,” Dhoni said.The legend said that there can be things that Ruturaj can pick up from him, but he essentially needs to be his own man. “Yes, there will be certain things that he will pick from the way I used to lead.But individuals are different…Whatever you feel is your style, you have the full liberty over here to decide,” Dhoni said.The 44-year-old explained how he advised his protege that he would be open to give advice. “I’m very open, I’ll come and talk to you, but you don’t have to do even one thing that I speak to you about. Let’s say I come up with ten pieces of advice, if you don’t follow even one, that is fair enough. When you are the leader, you have to take that responsibility. As a leader, you see the resources that you have and how you want to use it,” Dhoni added.The former skipper who guided the team to five titles insisted that he always insisted on the “cricket first” approach that led to the team’s success. “We are someone who believes in concentrating more on cricket. Yes, we have had to do a lot of other things that are surrounding cricket, but as a franchisee, we know that our essence is cricket and we should stick to that,” he said at the event organized by Etihad, one of the team sponsors.Dhoni’s amazing fan connect also came up for discussion and the Jharkhand man explained how he didn’t make an extra effort to ensure it.“In my case, I never wanted to woo fans or have more followers. I just wanted to be authentic, once you are authentic, people start loving you and they start picking up stuff that they love about you,” Dhoni said, which can be a lesson for the modern day reel hungry cricketers.He added that the consistency of the team went a long way in its success. “The support of the fans matters, when the chips are down, you can get that extra 10-15% from the crowd,” Dhoni said.
Article Summary: MS Dhoni came in late for practice on Sunday, got padded up, did a bit of warm- up and headed straight to the nets. There was no clarity from CSK whether he will play, even though it was told that he will do the customary fan events at the end of CSK's home campaign.

Article Title: Yesterday Match Result: Mitchell Starc’s fiery 4/40 powers DC past RR to keep playoff hopes alive
Article Text:
DC beat RR by 5 wickets. (IPL Photo)

NEW DELHI: Delhi Capitals are not ready to throw in the towel just yet as they hang on to their playoff qualification hopes by a thread.On the back of a superb bowling performance from Mitchell Starc and half-centuries from KL Rahul and Abishek Porel, the Capitals beat Rajasthan Royals by five wickets here on Sunday.A hat-trick of defeats has now put Royals in a must-win situation in the remaining two games. Royals seemed to miss the services of their premium allrounder Ravindra Jadeja , who was surprisingly benched for the crucial match against Capitals, citing ‘load management’.Starc’s outstanding late four-wicket burst helped the Capitals claw their way back into the game as they restricted Royals to 193 for eight after the visitors got off to a rollicking start. Rahul and Porel then put Capitals on the road to victory with a century opening stand. They were aided by some wayward bowling by the Royals bowlers in the Powerplay while Yash Raj Punja flooring a sitter off Rahul, when the batsman was on zero, didn’t help matters.Not one to be intimidated by Jofra Archer, Porel used the pace of the quickie to whip the ball out of the stadium for a six early in the Capitals chase. With Rahul too joining the party with some exquisite shots, Delhi Capitals raced to 72 without loss in the Powerplay, their best of IPL this season.Porel played some superbly timed square drives and upper cuts to help himself to fifty but was dismissed soon afterwards for 53 off 31 balls while Rahul too couldn’t carry on after his half-century as he was out for 56 off 42 balls. There were some nerves in the hosts’ camp when Capitals lost some quick wickets towards the end. However, skipper Axar Patel allayed those fears with a timely unbeaten 34 from 18 balls while ‘impact player’ Ashutosh Sharma provided a late cameo off 18 from five balls to take Capitals home with four balls to spare.Earlier, Rajasthan Royals couldn’t capitalise on their explosive start as Starc used all his experience to bring Delhi Capitals back into the game.After Vaibhav Sooryavanshi set the tone with a quickfire 46 off 21 balls, skipper Riyan Parag hit an explosive 51 from 26 balls as Royals looked charging towards an imposing total.Despite scoring a 40-ball 53, Dhruv Jurel failed to provide the innings the final flourish as Royals lost their momentum after the dismissal of Parag and had to be content with a total of 193 for eight in 20 overs.At 160 for two in 14 overs, Royals looked set for a total in excess of 220. But Starc, who was brought back into the attack, inflicted a triple blow on Royals in the 15th over to peg them back to a total below 200. First, he removed Parag with an off-cutter that saw the batter mistime his shot to Axar at long-on.Parag’s 51 came off 26 balls and included three fours and five sixes. Off the next delivery, the Aussie claimed Donovan Ferreira for a duck before trapping Royals Ravi Singh lbw for four. He conceded just six runs in the over. He claimed Jurel’s wicket in his final over to finish with figures of 4/40 from four overs. Jurel top-scored with a 40-ball 53.
Article Summary: Delhi Capitals beat Rajasthan Royals by five wickets in IPL. Mitchell Starc took four wickets for Delhi Capitals. KL Rahul and Abishek Porel scored half- centuries for the hosts. Royals have now lost their last three matches.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Will MS Dhoni play today in CSK's final home game of the season?
Article Text:
MS Dhoni (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

The Chepauk question refuses to fade

Training clues, selection dilemmas and growing buzz

Poll Will MS Dhoni play in the final home game of IPL 2026 at Chepauk? Yes, he will play No, he won't play

Beyond Dhoni: pressure mounts on CSK

CHENNAI: As Chennai Super Kings prepare for their final home game of IPL 2026 against Sunrisers Hyderabad on Monday, one question has completely overshadowed team combinations, points tables, and even playoff permutations — will MS Dhoni finally play at Chepauk this season?The MA Chidambaram Stadium has been at the centre of rising anticipation ever since Dhoni’s subtle but intriguing training routine on the eve of the match. As per an Indian Express report when the clock struck 6:30 PM on match-eve, a padded-up Dhoni walked out of the dressing room and made his way to the indoor facility. For the first time in weeks, he was without a trainer by his side.After a short stretching and mobility routine, the 44-year-old spent around 15 minutes waiting before heading into the nets. Once there, Dhoni batted for nearly 30 minutes alongside Prashant Veer, facing throwdowns and later spinners, even clearing the ropes on multiple occasions. By 7:30 PM, he was back in the dressing room—leaving fans and observers with more questions than answers.Dhoni’s availability has remained the biggest mystery of CSK’s season. Having missed games due to a calf injury earlier in the tournament and later opting out of selection considerations to avoid disrupting balance, the veteran wicketkeeper has not featured in a single matchday squad so far.However, hope has been rekindled ahead of this must-win clash, especially with CSK’s playoff hopes still hanging in the balance.A past remark from Dhoni in 2021 has resurfaced among fans: “Hopefully, my last T20 will be in Chennai.” That statement has now taken on renewed significance as speculation grows over a potential appearance at Chepauk.Ticket demand has surged again at the stadium, with fans flocking to secure seats for what could be one of the most emotionally charged nights of the season. After relatively subdued crowds in parts of the campaign, Monday’s clash has seen a sharp spike in interest across ticketing platforms and secondary markets, as per the report.Dhoni’s net session has only added to the intrigue. After previously limiting himself largely to throwdowns, he was seen confidently facing spinners and striking them into the stands. While CSK’s overseas combination remains flexible, injuries and tactical reshuffles have opened up potential room in the XI, especially after Jamie Overton’s departure.At the same time, uncertainty continues around CSK’s team balance, with Akeal Hosein unlikely to feature due to matchup considerations, while South African all-rounder Dian Forrester has joined the squad as a late option.Former India spinner Ravichandran Ashwin added fuel to speculation, suggesting in a video that he has “heard” Dhoni has been fit for the past few games and could make an appearance in this fixture.“I have a feeling that against Sunrisers Hyderabad, there is a good chance of MS Dhoni playing,” Ashwin said.While Dhoni dominates headlines, CSK’s season hangs in the balance. Another early exit would mark their third consecutive year without a playoff appearance, intensifying scrutiny on the team’s direction and even head coach Stephen Fleming, who has faced rare criticism.For Sunrisers Hyderabad too, the match carries significant weight as they push for qualification points in a tightly packed table.Despite all the permutations and pressure, the spotlight remains fixed on one man. Whether MS Dhoni walks out at Chepauk on Monday could define CSK’s night.
Article Summary: CSK face Sunrisers Hyderabad in their final home game of IPL 2026. MS Dhoni has not featured in a single matchday squad so far. Ravichandran Ashwin says there is a 'good chance' of Dhoni playing.

Article Title: IPL 2026: How Delhi Capitals can still qualify for playoffs after RR win
Article Text:
Delhi Capitals (ANI Photo)

Poll Will Delhi Capitals qualify for the playoffs this season? Yes, they will make it No, they won't qualify

Delhi Capitals kept their playoff hopes alive with a crucial win over Rajasthan Royals on Sunday, but their path to qualification remains extremely narrow and heavily dependent on other results.After the victory, Delhi Capitals moved to 12 points from 13 matches with a net run rate of -0.871. They now have just one league game remaining, which means the maximum they can reach is 14 points.The situation is complicated because several teams remain in direct contention for the final playoff spots. Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals are both in stronger positions and can finish on 16 points if they win their remaining matches. Meanwhile, Kolkata Knight Riders can still reach up to 15 points if they win both of their remaining fixtures.For Delhi Capitals to qualify at 14 points, the equation is simple on paper but extremely demanding in reality. They would need both Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals to lose all of their remaining matches, ensuring neither crosses the 14-point mark. At the same time, Kolkata Knight Riders must lose at least one of their remaining two games to prevent them from moving beyond 15 points.Even if all these results go Delhi’s way, the net run rate hurdle makes the scenario even more difficult. CSK and RR currently sit with slightly positive net run rates around +0.027, while KKR are marginally negative at -0.038. Delhi’s -0.871 means they would not only need to win but win convincingly against KKR in their final league match to stand any chance of overtaking on net run rate.However, the margins suggest that even that may not be enough. If either CSK or RR win even one more game, Delhi will struggle to catch them on net run rate, regardless of their final result. In most realistic combinations, one of those teams would finish ahead on points or NRR, shutting the door on DC.The match against Kolkata Knight Riders now becomes a must-win for Delhi Capitals. A victory would not only give DC two points but also ensure that KKR can no longer reach 15 points, significantly simplifying the qualification equation. However, Delhi would still remain dependent on other results involving Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals, along with a required net run rate swing that currently does not favour them.In essence, while Delhi Capitals are mathematically still in the race, their qualification scenario is one of the most complicated in the league: they must win big, hope for multiple upsets, and rely on net run rate swings that are currently stacked against them.
Article Summary: Delhi Capitals moved to 12 points from 13 matches with a net run rate of -0.871. They now have just one league game remaining, which means the maximum they can reach is 14 points. Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals are both in stronger positions and can finish on 16 points if they win their remaining matches. Kolkata Knight Riders can still reach up to 15 points.

Article Title: Xabi Alonso appointed Chelsea manager on four-year deal
Article Text:
Xabi Alonso (Image credit: Chelsea FC)

Chelsea on Sunday announced the appointment of Xabi Alonso as the club’s new manager on a four-year contract. Alonso will become the sixth permanent manager at Stamford Bridge in the last four years, following Thomas Tuchel, Graham Potter, Mauricio Pochettino, Enzo Maresca and Liam Rosenior.Chelsea head into a new era after a disappointing campaign that saw them lose the FA Cup final to Manchester City on Saturday and sit ninth in the Premier League with two matches remaining in the season."Chelsea Football Club is delighted to announce the appointment of Xabi Alonso as manager of the men’s team," Chelsea said in a statement."The Spaniard will begin his role on July 1, 2026, having agreed a four-year contract at Stamford Bridge."Alonso earned widespread praise after guiding Bayer Leverkusen to an unbeaten Bundesliga and German Cup double during the 2023/24 campaign, establishing himself as one of Europe’s most highly-rated young coaches.However, his stint with Real Madrid CF proved far less successful. Alonso, who was appointed last year, left the Spanish giants in January after just seven months in charge.The former Spain midfielder now faces the challenge of restoring Chelsea as contenders for major trophies.Although Chelsea lifted the FIFA Club World Cup and the UEFA Conference League last year, the club has struggled to justify the massive spending under owners BlueCo since their takeover in 2022 following the end of Roman Abramovich’s era at the club.Chelsea’s defeat at Wembley on Saturday extended their wait for a domestic trophy to eight seasons.The club’s ownership has also faced criticism from supporters over its aggressive recruitment strategy focused on signing young talent from around the world.That approach has produced some success stories, including England international Cole Palmer, but questions remain over the lack of experience in both the squad and coaching staff.Alonso’s appointment is viewed as a major statement from Chelsea’s owners.Many Liverpool F.C. supporters had hoped Alonso would return to Anfield, where he starred as a player between 2004 and 2009, to replace the under-pressure Arne Slot.(With inputs from AFP)
Article Summary: Chelsea appoint Xabi Alonso as their new manager on a four-year contract. Alonso will become the sixth permanent manager at Stamford Bridge in the last four years. The Spaniard will begin his role on July 1, 2026. Alonso left Real Madrid CF in January after just seven months in charge.

Article Title: Ryan Williams has opened door to more players: Khalid Jamil
Article Text:
Khalid Jamil (Image credit: X)

PANAJI: India coach Khalid Jamil has been tracking performances of at least three players who are willing to follow in the footsteps of Ryan Williams and represent the national team.Williams, 32, surrendered his Australian citizenship and took up an Indian passport which made him eligible to represent the national team. The Bengaluru FC winger’s inclusion meant more firepower in attack, and Jamil is now convinced that adding a few more players could help turn the corner.“Once we make these additions, there will be healthy competition for places,” Jamil told TOI on Saturday. “Williams has definitely opened the door for others. It’s a good sign.”The India coach did not reveal the identities or status of the players. With Sunil Chhetri’s international retirement, a striker remains priority. “I want to have a good look. We are looking at players based on positions that we want to strengthen. There are three players. We are waiting for documents,” he said.According to Jamil, at least one of the players will be included among the probables later this year.“I have watched his matches and already given the go ahead. He is playing abroad and will be called here (to join the camp),” said Jamil.Ahead of the clash against Hong Kong in Kochi on March 31, Jamil invited Academia del Balompie Boliviano defender Abneet Bharti to join the camp. The Nepal-born India passport holder plies his trade in the top tier of Bolivian football but could not get the nod. The India coach has now sounded out Som Kumar. The young former Kerala Blasters goalkeeper was the first to make a move to Slovenia where he joined first divisioners NK Radomlje and later ND Slovan.
Article Summary: India coach Khalid Jamil has been tracking performances of at least three players who are willing to follow in the footsteps of Ryan Williams. Williams surrendered his Australian citizenship and took up an Indian passport which made him eligible to represent the national team. The India coach did not reveal the identities or status of the players.

Article Title: Antoine Semenyo’s backheel magic hands Manchester City FA Cup title
Article Text:
Manchester City players pose with the winner's trophy after the English FA Cup final soccer match between Chelsea and Manchester City in London, Saturday, May 16, 2026. (AP Photo)

Manchester City FC defeated Chelsea FC 1-0 in the FA Cup Final at Wembley Stadium on Saturday, with Antoine Semenyo scoring the only goal of the match.The final had produced few chances before Semenyo broke the deadlock in the 72nd minute. Meeting a cross from Erling Haaland, the forward used a back-heel flick to send the ball into the far corner past Chelsea goalkeeper Robert Sánchez.The win kept Manchester City in contention for a domestic treble after already winning the English League Cup this season. Pep Guardiola’s side is also second in the Premier League table, two points behind Arsenal FC with two rounds remaining.It was Guardiola’s 17th major trophy in 10 years at Manchester City and the 35th of his managerial career.Manchester City won the FA Cup for the eighth time and moved level with Chelsea, Liverpool FC and Tottenham Hotspur FC on the all-time winners’ list.Chelsea’s defeat means the club will finish the season without a trophy, one year after winning the Club World Cup. The campaign has been marked by instability, with the club changing two coaches since the start of the year.Chelsea were led by Calum McFarlane, a former youth coach taking charge of only his seventh first-team match.Before kickoff, Chelsea supporters protested against the club’s American owners outside Wembley Stadium.Despite the circumstances, Chelsea managed to frustrate Manchester City for much of the match before Semenyo’s winner.The Ghana forward joined Manchester City from AFC Bournemouth in January and has now scored 10 goals for the club while helping them win two trophies.After the match, Manchester City fans sang “Blue Moon” as Bernardo Silva and John Stones lifted the trophy. Both players are set to leave the club at the end of the season.“Since I arrived it’s been 20 trophies, which isn’t bad. I care a lot about Manchester City," said Bernardo, counting Community Shield victories as well.Manchester City had lost the previous two FA Cup finals before this victory. This was also the fourth straight year they reached the final, having last won the competition in 2023.Arsenal remain the most successful club in FA Cup history with 14 titles, while Manchester United FC are second with 13.
Article Summary: Manchester City FC defeated Chelsea FC 1-0 in the FA Cup Final at Wembley Stadium on Saturday. Antoine Semenyo scored the only goal of the match in the 72nd minute. The win kept Manchester City in contention for a domestic treble after already winning the English League Cup.

Article Title: Defensive disaster! Liverpool concede 50-plus goals for first time in Premier League history
Article Text:
Aston Villa and Liverpool at Villa Park (Getty Images)

Defending Premier League champions Liverpool F.C. reached an unwanted milestone on Friday night, conceding 50-plus goals in a 38-game Premier League season for the first time in the club’s history. The Reds’ defensive nightmare culminated in a chaotic 4-2 defeat to Aston Villa F.C. at Villa Park, leaving their Champions League hopes hanging in the balance.Heading into the crucial clash, both teams knew a victory would significantly strengthen their chances of securing a top-five finish and Champions League qualification. It was Villa, however, who rose to the occasion with a deserved win over the reigning champions.Already out of the title race, Liverpool head coach Arne Slot had demanded a disciplined defensive performance from his side after they had already conceded 48 goals this season. Instead, Liverpool suffered another tactical collapse.Morgan Rogers opened the scoring for the hosts in the 42nd minute following a well-worked set-piece routine. In the second half, Ollie Watkins struck twice before John McGinn added a stunning late goal in the 88th minute, exposing Liverpool’s fragile backline once again.Even a fighting brace from captain Virgil van Dijk could not hide the alarming defensive issues. With his two headed goals, Van Dijk now holds the record for the most headed Premier League goals scored for Liverpool, with 22.The four goals conceded pushed Liverpool’s tally to an embarrassing 52 goals leaked in 37 league matches, surpassing their previous worst of 50 goals conceded during the 2013-14 campaign under Brendan Rodgers. The Merseyside club now ranks among the league’s weakest defensive sides this season.Liverpool’s struggles against quick transitions and high-pressing opponents have consistently hurt them throughout the campaign. The lack of protection from midfield has repeatedly left the central defenders isolated and vulnerable, something Villa exploited brilliantly through Unai Emery’s aggressive counter-attacking setup.Depending on other results, Liverpool may now need to defeat Brentford F.C. on the final matchday to guarantee qualification for next season’s Champions League alongside Aston Villa.
Article Summary: Defending Premier League champions Liverpool F.C. lost 4-2 to Aston Villa at Villa Park. Morgan Rogers, Ollie Watkins, John McGinn and Virgil van Dijk scored for Villa. Liverpool have now conceded 50-plus goals in a 38-game Premier League season for the first time.

Article Title: 'Dai Dai': Shakira teams up with Burna Boy for official FIFA World Cup 2026 anthem
Article Text:
Argentina's Lionel Messi celebrates with the trophy in front of the fans after winning the World Cup final soccer match between Argentina and France at the Lusail Stadium in Lusail, Qatar, Sunday, Dec. 18, 2022. (AP Photo)

Shakira and Burna Boy have teamed up for "Dai Dai", the official song of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.The song combines Afrobeats and Latin rhythms in a multilingual pop track. In one part of the song, the singers mention several football-playing nations."Brazil, Uruguay, Argentina, Colombia," Shakira sings. "Mexico, Japan, Korea, Netherlands."After the first chorus, Shakira and Burna Boy sing separate verses before coming together again for a duet.The release comes days after FIFA announced that Shakira, Madonna and BTS will headline the tournament’s first final halftime show on July 19 at MetLife Stadium. The lineup was curated by Chris Martin of Coldplay.The halftime show will support the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund, which aims to raise USD 100 million to help children access education and football.Last week, Shakira shared a teaser of "Dai Dai" on social media. In the clip, she was seen dancing at Maracanã Stadium while singing part of the opening verse."Here in this place / You belong," she sang. "What broke you once / Made you strong."The World Cup will be co-hosted by United States, Canada and Mexico and will take place in June and July.
Article Summary: Shakira and Burna Boy have teamed up for "Dai Dai", the official song of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The song combines Afrobeats and Latin rhythms in a multilingual pop track. The World Cup will be co-hosted by United States, Canada and Mexico.

Article Title: David Beckham joins elite club, becomes Britain’s first billionaire sportsman
Article Text:
David Beckham with Victoria Beckham (Image Via Getty)



From

football icon to business

powerhouse

Victoria’s business rise

Former Manchester United and England icon David Beckham has reached a new milestone off the pitch, becoming Britain’s first billionaire sportsman after his family fortune surged past the £1 billion mark.According to the 2026 Sunday Times Rich List, Beckham and wife Victoria Beckham now have a combined estimated wealth of £1.185 billion ($1.58 billion), making them one of the richest sporting families in the UK.The achievement puts Beckham in a unique place in British sporting history, decades after he first rose to global fame as one of football’s biggest stars. The 51-year-old retired in 2013 but has built an empire that extends far beyond his playing career.Beckham’s wealth has grown sharply through his stake in Inter Miami CF, the Major League Soccer side he co-owns. The club is now valued at around £1.07 billion, making it one of the most valuable football franchises in North America.He also remains one of the world’s most recognisable sporting figures, with major endorsement deals through Adidas and Hugo Boss adding millions annually to his fortune.Beckham’s football career included six Premier League titles and the Champions League with Manchester United, followed by high-profile spells at Real Madrid CF, LA Galaxy, AC Milan and Paris Saint-Germain F.C..A significant share of the family wealth comes from Victoria Beckham’s luxury fashion business. The former Spice Girls member has transformed her brand into a profitable global label.Among other sports stars on the Rich List, Lewis Hamilton ranked fifth with £435 million, while Rory McIlroy, Anthony Joshua and Tyson Fury also featured.
Article Summary: Beckham and wife Victoria now have a combined estimated wealth of £1.185 billion ($1.58 billion) The 51-year-old retired in 2013 but has built an empire that extends far beyond his playing career. Beckham’s wealth has grown sharply through his stake in Inter Miami CF, the Major League Soccer side he co-owns.

Article Title: Inter Kashi players threaten to boycott ISL ties over unpaid wages
Article Text: KOLKATA : Last season’s ILeague winners, Inter Kashi players have threatened to “boycott” their final two matches of the ongoing Indian Super League , citing unpaid salaries and plunging the Varanasi-based club’s debut season in the top league into a full-blown crisis.The players’ apparent revolt has come close on the heels of veteran Spanish head coach Antonio Lopez Habas’ decision to leave his post before the team’s last match against Mohun Bagan SG here on Tuesday.Inter Kashi — currently placed 10th on the standings with 12 points from 11 matches — are scheduled to wind up their campaign with a game at SC Delhi in the Capital on Sunday before facing East Bengal.“Of the past four months, we have received only onemonth’s salary. Even payment for members of the staff is due. If the club doesn’t resolve the issue immediately and clear our pending dues, we’re not going to play the last two matches of the season,” an Inter Kashi player seeking anonymity told TOI . “If the club management doesn’t address our financial issues and make payment before Saturday, we’re not going to travel to New Delhi and will also boycott the final match (against East Bengal),” the player added.An Inter Kashi-like storm is also brewing at Mohammedan SC. Mehrajuddin Wadoo’s last-placed side is facing relegation after managing just 3 points from 11 matches. A few days ago, players boycotted training over unpaid wages, prompting the club management to persuade them to play with the assurance of a partial payment.
Article Summary: Last season’s ILeague winners, Inter Kashi players have threatened to ‘boycott’ their final two matches of the ongoing Indian Super League. The players’ apparent revolt has come close on the heels of veteran Spanish head coach Antonio Lopez Habas’ decision to leave his post.

Article Title: Out of contract, footballers fret over future
Article Text:
Petr Kratky (Image credit: X)

PANAJI : When Petr Kratky spoke about the uncertainty plaguing his future at Mumbai City FC , he was speaking not just for himself but several other coaches and players who do not know when they will sign their next contract.Kratky, who won the Indian Super League (ISL) with Mumbai in his debut season two years ago, has “spoken briefly” with the club about life beyond this season. There are no assurances, simply because nobody really knows the roadmap for the future as the All India Football Federation (AIFF) tries to onboard a commercial partner.“There is uncertainty for all of us,” Kratky said after the loss against East Bengal last week. “There are no secrets, we don’t know what will happen in two months. We don’t know whether the ISL will happen or not. Players (too) have a lot of questions. ‘Will I have a contract or not,’ they wonder? It’s a difficult situation.”India’s current football season ends in a fortnight. But clubs have stalled contract talks with their players. No new targets have been locked, out-of-contract foreigners are free to engage elsewhere.Based on information available on the federation’s Centralised Registration system (CRS), at least 148 players in the top tier of Indian football will be without a contract at the end of the month.Twenty per cent of them are either national team players, those knocking on the doors or have previously represented India.Even a cash-rich club like Mohun Bagan SG have not signed new contracts.Among the out-of-contract players are several national team stars, which includes captain Sandesh Jhingan, who has spent the last three years at FC Goa. Bengaluru’s experienced defender Rahul Bheke, Nikhil Prabhu, Danish Farooq, Amrinder Singh, Prabsukhan Singh Gill, Deepak Tangri, Ayush Chettri, Udanta Singh, Brison Fernandes, Ritwik Das, Isak Vanlalruatfela, Rahul KP, Farukh Chaudhury, Puitea and Irfan Yadwad are other popular footballers who will keep an eye on what transpires between the clubs and the federation.“We are currently out of contract with a vast majority of the players and unfortunately our hands are tied,” said Goa CEO Ravi Puskur. “The long-term clarity is vital for us to plan and we don’t have that.”The AIFF appears keen to accept a bid from London-headquartered data company, Genius Sports, for the commercial rights of ISL and Federation Cup. Top tier clubs have said the bid does not make commercial sense. Instead, they have proposed a club-led model, with Genius Sports as the data and technology partner.
Article Summary: India’s current football season ends in a fortnight, but clubs have stalled contract talks with their players. At least 148 players in the top tier of Indian football will be without a contract at the end of the month.Twenty per cent of them are either national team players, those knocking on the doors or have previously represented India.

Article Title: Khalid Jamil names 28-member preliminary India squad for Unity Cup 2026; Anirudh Thapa returns
Article Text:
Indian football team players

What is the Unity Cup ?

Goalkeepers

Defenders

Midfielders

Forwards

NEW DELHI: Indian Senior men’s football team head coach Khalid Jamil announced a 28-member preliminary squad for the upcoming Unity Cup 2026 on Thursday, highlighted by the return of Mohun Bagan midfielder Anirudh Thapa.The Blue Tigers will assemble in Bengaluru for a brief training camp following the conclusion of the Indian Super League (ISL) 2025-26 season. The head coach will evaluate the players during this camp before finalizing a 23-member roster to board the flight to London on May 24.Jamil emphasized that testing the team against higher-ranked opponents provides crucial exposure. “We need to utilize every available FIFA International Window to prepare for the tournaments up ahead,” the coach said, pointing toward the SAFF Championship later this year.The Unity Cup is a premier international football tournament celebrating Afro-Centric and global diaspora communities. First staged in 2002 at Loftus Road, home to Queens Park Rangers (QPR) and subsequently held at The Valley in 2004, the tournament was revived in 2025 at Brentford after a prolonged hiatus. After the massive success of the 2025 edition, the 2026 edition marks a sentimental return to its historic home, The Valley—the home ground of Charlton Athletic FC in South London—running from May 26 to May 30.The four-nation knockout event features defending champions Nigeria, Jamaica, Zimbabwe, and India. This participation holds immense historical significance for the Blue Tigers, marking their return to the United Kingdom for international fixtures after a 24-year hiatus.Currently ranked 136th globally, India faces a daunting challenge against 71st-ranked Jamaica in the second semi-final on May 27 midnight (May 28 IST). Meanwhile, tournament heavyweights Nigeria (ranked 26th) take on Zimbabwe (ranked 130th) in the opening semi-final on May 26. The winners will advance to the final on May 30, while the losing sides will play the third-place play-off earlier that day.India's 28-member preliminary squad for Unity Cup 2026:: Gurpreet Singh Sandhu, Vishal Kaith, Hrithik Tiwari, Albino Gomes.: Rahul Bheke, Nikhil Poojary, Roshan Singh Naorem, Abhishek Singh Tekcham, Anwar Ali, Sandesh Jhingan, Akash Mishra, Bijoy Varghese, Pramveer.: Ashique Kuruniyan, Lalengmawia Ralte, Sahal Abdul Samad, Anirudh Thapa, Jeakson Singh Thounaojam, Noufal PN, Ricky Shabong.: Ryan Williams, Manvir Singh, Liston Colaco, Suhail Ahmad Bhat, Edmund Lalrindika, Lallianzuala Chhangte, Rahim Ali, Farukh Choudhary.
Article Summary: India announce a 28-member preliminary squad for the upcoming Unity Cup 2026. The Blue Tigers will assemble in Bengaluru for a brief training camp following the conclusion of the Indian Super League (ISL) 2025-26 season. India faces a daunting challenge against 71st-ranked Jamaica in the second semi-final on May 27.

Article Title: Who is A.J. Brown's wife? Everything you need to know about Kelsey Riley as they tied the knot in Laguna Beach
Article Text:
A.J. Brown and wife Kelsey Riley (Instagram)

Who is A.J. Brown's wife Kelsey Riley?



How did A.J. Brown and Kelsey Riley’s relationship develop over the years?



Philadelphia Eagles wide receiver A.J. Brown added another major milestone to a memorable year over the weekend after marrying longtime partner Kelsey Riley in a private California ceremony. According to TMZ Sports, the couple tied the knot on May 16 at Montage Laguna Beach, surrounded by family, teammates and close friends. The wedding came nearly a year after Brown’s headline-grabbing proposal in Philadelphia and months after helping the Eagles capture another Super Bowl title. The celebration reflected the quieter side of one of the NFL’s biggest stars, with family moments and personal touches shaping the evening.Kelsey Riley has largely stayed away from the spotlight despite being in a relationship with one of the NFL’s most recognizable receivers. Born in August 1997 and raised in Belle Chasse, Louisiana, Riley built her own athletic background long before becoming known publicly alongside Brown.She played multiple sports growing up and later starred as a softball outfielder at Texas Southern University. Riley earned First Team All-Conference honors in 2017 and graduated in 2019.During her college years, she was also a member of Alpha Kappa Alpha and attended the same university as rapper Megan Thee Stallion.Away from sports, Riley pursued a career in healthcare. Her professional background includes work as a patient access representative at St. Luke’s Medical Center in Houston, along with previous experience in hospitality and patient care coordination. She was also accepted into nursing school in 2021, a step that highlighted her long-term commitment to the medical field.Brown has always been selective about discussing his private life publicly, but he has occasionally opened up about the people closest to him. During a 2023 interview with The Philadelphia Inquirer, Brown said, “I know where all my blessings come from. And that’s the way I remain humble. I got a cross on. That’s what’s important to me — and my daughter, my son, my girlfriend.”The exact beginning of Brown and Riley’s relationship remains unclear, though the couple first went public in February 2022 when Riley shared photos from a winter trip together. Later that year, they welcomed their son, Arthur Juan Brown Jr., on Sept. 29, 2022. Brown’s daughter, Jersee, from a previous relationship, also became part of their growing family dynamic.Their engagement followed in May 2025, shortly after the Eagles’ Super Bowl celebration. Brown proposed at the Four Seasons in Philadelphia with a pear-shaped diamond ring while John Legend performed “You and I” during the intimate moment. Several Eagles teammates attended the proposal, making it one of the more talked-about NFL off-field moments of the year.This weekend’s wedding carried the same personal feel. Guests reportedly wore shades of brown as part of the dress code, while violinists welcomed attendees before the ceremony began. Brown’s son also had one of the night’s most memorable entrances, drawing applause from guests as he walked in holding Skittles moments before the ceremony.
Article Summary: Philadelphia Eagles wide receiver A.J. Brown married longtime partner Kelsey Riley. The couple tied the knot on May 16 at Montage Laguna Beach, California. The wedding came nearly a year after Brown’s headline-grabbing proposal in Philadelphia.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Minnesota Vikings and Baltimore Ravens could pursue $13 million Buffalo Bills defensive end
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Minnesota Vikings and Baltimore Ravens could pursue $13 million Buffalo Bills defensive end(Getty Images)

NFL Trade Rumors: Minnesota Vikings and Baltimore Ravens seen as strong fits for Joey Bosa after Buffalo Bills' season

Joey Bosa is still available in free agency, and that situation has quietly turned into one of the more interesting late offseason stories in the NFL . After spending the 2025 season with the Buffalo Bills on a one-year deal, the veteran edge rusher showed enough to keep his name alive in NFL trade rumors. The Minnesota Vikings and Baltimore Ravens have now emerged as two teams being linked to a possible move for him as training camp approaches in 2026.NFL analyst David Latham of Last Word on Sports noted that Bosa’s market has stayed active because teams still believe he can contribute in the right role. That belief comes from what he showed in Buffalo and from how thin some contenders are at pass rush depth right now.Joey Bosa’s 2025 season with the Buffalo Bills did not look like his peak years with the Los Angeles Chargers, but it did help stabilize his value around the league. He finished with five sacks, nine tackles for loss, and five forced fumbles, along with a 74.6 PFF grade. While those credentials do not place him among star edge rushers anymore, they do show that he can still shine in plays and create pressure in key moments.His biggest improvement with the Bills was his availability. After fighting with injuries from 2022 to 2024, Bosa managed to stay on the field for a full season, which changed how teams evaluate him heading into 2026 free agency.The Minnesota Vikings are one of the most logical landing spots. The defense still needs a consistent edge presence to support Andrew Van Ginkel and Dallas Turner, and DC Brian Flores prefers aggressive pressure schemes that rely on rotation and situational rushers. Bosa fits that system because he does not need to play every snap to make an impact, and he can still win matchups on third downs. Minnesota also enters the 2026 season under pressure to compete immediately, especially with ongoing uncertainty at QB, which makes experienced defensive help even more valuable.The Baltimore Ravens are in a similar position, even after adding Trey Hendrickson earlier in the offseason. ESPN NFL analyst Matt Bowen has pointed out that Baltimore continues to explore depth options on the edge because they want sustained pressure across an entire season rather than relying on one or two primary rushers. Bosa would give them another veteran option who can rotate in, keep starters fresh, and step up in obvious passing situations when needed.San Francisco has also been mentioned in passing because of the obvious connection with Nick Bosa, but roster needs and scheme fit make Minnesota and Baltimore more realistic landing spots at this stage. Joey Bosa’s market now feels less about name value and more about role, and both teams offer him a clear path to meaningful snaps in 2026.
Article Summary: Minnesota Vikings and Baltimore Ravens seen as strong fits for Joey Bosa after Buffalo Bills' season. Bosa is still available in free agency, and that situation has quietly turned into one of the more interesting late offseason stories in the NFL. The veteran edge rusher showed enough to keep his name alive in NFL trade rumors.

Article Title: NFL Rumors: New England Patriots predicted to move on from popular $4 million WR before Week 1 kickoff
Article Text:
New England Patriots (Getty Images)

Why has DeMario Douglas suddenly become expendable in New England?



The New England Patriots have spent the offseason rebuilding the offense around second-year quarterback Drake Maye, but one of the biggest storylines entering OTAs is not about a newcomer. It is about whether DeMario Douglas still fits into the team’s future plans at all. Just two years ago, Douglas looked like one of the few reliable pieces in New England’s passing game. Now, after a dramatic drop in usage and a crowded receiver room, the 24-year-old enters the summer facing real uncertainty about both his role and long-term future with the franchise.DeMario Douglas earned respect quickly after arriving from Liberty University as a sixth-round pick in 2023. Despite limited expectations, he became one of the Patriots’ most dependable offensive players during a difficult stretch for the organization. His quickness out of the slot gave the offense energy, and his chemistry with Maye became noticeable during the 2024 season when he tied Hunter Henry for the team lead with 66 catches.That momentum disappeared last season.Under offensive coordinator Josh McDaniels, Douglas went from featured contributor to rotational option almost overnight.He finished 2025 with only 31 receptions for 447 yards and did not start a single game. His offensive snap percentage dropped sharply, a clear sign the coaching staff no longer viewed him as a primary piece of the attack.The biggest reason was personnel. Stefon Diggs handled much of the slot work after arriving in free agency, leaving Douglas fighting for limited opportunities. The Patriots later added Romeo Doubs, another versatile receiver capable of lining up both outside and inside. Reports linking New England to A.J. Brown only intensified questions about Douglas’ standing.What makes the situation complicated is that Douglas still produced when targeted. His 14.4 yards per catch last season was the best mark of his career. The issue was opportunity, not efficiency.His contract only adds more pressure. Douglas is entering the later stages of a rookie deal worth just under $4 million, and there have been no extension talks. While his cap hit is not massive, it slightly outweighs his projected market value, which makes him easier to move if the Patriots decide to keep reshaping the roster.Still, Douglas has made it clear he wants to remain in Foxborough. In February, he told The Boston Globe, “I haven’t had any talks about an extension, but I would love to stay. This feels like home. I’ve been here three seasons now, and I love the coaching staff and my teammates. I would definitely love to come back.”That honesty may resonate inside the building, but sentiment alone rarely decides roster spots in the NFL. With OTAs nearing and competition growing, Douglas now enters a pivotal stretch that could determine whether he remains part of New England’s future or becomes one of the offseason’s most surprising departures.
Article Summary: The New England Patriots have spent the offseason rebuilding the offense. DeMario Douglas is facing real uncertainty about his role and long-term future with the franchise. Douglas is entering the later stages of a rookie deal worth just under $4 million. He has made it clear he wants to remain in Foxborough.

Article Title: Brittany Mahomes turns heads with timeless Hollywood makeover while supporting Patrick Mahomes charity night
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes (Imagn Images)

What Did Brittany Mahomes Wear to the 15 and the Mahomies Foundation Gala?



While the NFL offseason usually pulls star players away from the spotlight, Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes have stayed visible through their growing charity work in Kansas City. The couple recently hosted another black-tie event tied to the 15 and the Mahomies Foundation, an organization that has steadily expanded its reach through literacy programs, scholarships, and fundraising efforts. But alongside the foundation’s mission, Brittany’s fashion choice quickly became one of the night’s biggest talking points, blending classic Hollywood influence with the polished public image the Mahomes family continues to build beyond football.Brittany Mahomes arrived at the foundation event in a sharply tailored black gown that immediately sparked comparisons to Audrey Hepburn and her famous look in Breakfast at Tiffany's. The dress carried the same timeless silhouette associated with Hepburn’s iconic style, particularly through its structured high neckline and sleek shape. Still, Brittany avoided making the outfit feel like a direct recreation.The gown included ruched detailing along both sides, giving the look a more modern edge and softening what could have otherwise felt overly formal. Her pointed-toe heels completed the outfit without distracting from it. The styling stayed clean, deliberate, and understated, which helped the overall look stand out even more on a night already filled with high-profile guests.Before the event, Brittany shared parts of the preparation process on Instagram, posting behind-the-scenes photos while getting her hair and makeup done. Several of the images also featured Patrick Mahomes before the couple left for the gala and later once they arrived on the red carpet as the evening’s featured hosts.The posts reflected more than a fashion moment. They reinforced how the Mahomes family continues to present itself publicly during the offseason. Patrick’s influence in the NFL already extends well beyond football, and the couple has increasingly leaned into philanthropy as a major part of their public identity.That message became even clearer in Brittany’s caption after the event. She wrote, “We are so blessed to be surrounded by such incredible people who are committed to making a difference in this world with us. Best night celebrating with those who help us make it happen.”The foundation’s work remains the central focus, but events like this also show how carefully the Mahomes brand connects visibility, community work, and cultural relevance without forcing attention toward any one piece of it.
Article Summary: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes hosted a charity gala in Kansas City. Brittany wore a sharply tailored black gown that drew comparisons to Audrey Hepburn. The couple has increasingly leaned into philanthropy as a major part of their public identity. The Mahomes family continues to present itself publicly during the offseason.
